title: Opening: First Encounter with AI Coder
content:
That transformative night is still clearly screened in my memory like a movie. When I stood on the edge of the technology tide, my fingers trembled slightly, my mouse clicked slowly, and I nervously installed Copilot in VS Code. I felt uneasy and expectant, just like I was about to open Pandora's box, not knowing what secrets were hidden inside. 

![ Encounter with AI Coder](/uploads/1739600060396-.PNG)

I carefully planned and polished it repeatedly to build a detailed roadmap for the construction of a Next.js blog system. It was a concrete presentation of my technology dream. Every step embodied my thoughts and expectations. However, when AI's code generation capabilities hit like a surging tide, all of this collapsed instantly and disappeared without a trace.

For the next three hours, I felt like I was in a completely new technological universe. Under the traditional development model, it often takes a full 3 days to build a project framework. Every configuration and every line of basic code need to be built by hand. The process is cumbersome and error - prone. While AI - assisted development only takes 3 hours, and a complete functional prototype was already in front of you, as if by magic. 

When dealing with CORS configuration, it used to take 2 hours to explore various documents and codes, constantly trying various parameter combinations, and often being tormented by complex cross - domain rules. Now, Copilot automatically generates solutions, and this problem was solved instantly, as easy as taking a pill. In the writing of test cases, manually creating 15 test cases in the past required a lot of effort and careful consideration of various boundary conditions and exceptions. While AI completed 98% of the test coverage in a short time, and the generated test cases were comprehensive and accurate.

When I saw that AI not only quickly generated CRUD APIs but also perfectly completed the ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration) configuration that I had forgotten myself, I couldn't help but laugh at the screen. This seemed to be a code phantom that had traveled from the future, breaking my cognitive boundaries of traditional development. Jest unit tests also automatically adapted to my coding style. Looking at the eye - catching green coverage percentage in the test report, it was like silently mocking the cumbersome and inefficiency of traditional development processes, which made me deeply aware that the wave of technological change had arrived, and I was standing on the top of the wave.

## Three - hour disruption: Comparison of tradition and AI - assisted development
![AI Coder](/uploads/1739600344331-2.PNG)
In this storm of technological change, the comparison between traditional development models and AI - assisted development models is like a contest that transcends the era, and every detail demonstrates the power of technological progress.

### Building the framework
Traditional development is like a craftsman, requiring careful carving of every "cornerstone". To build a stable and fully functional project framework, it takes developers a full 3 days. They need to carefully configure various environment parameters and write a large amount of basic code, from the project's directory structure planning to the installation and configuration of various dependency libraries. Every step cannot be missed. Even a small spelling error may lead to difficult problems in the subsequent development process, and the entire process is full of challenges and uncertainties.

AI - assisted development is like an elf with magical magic. It can easily build a functional prototype in just 3 hours. It can quickly analyze project requirements, filter out the most suitable solutions from a large number of code templates, and automatically generate corresponding code structures. Just like building Lego bricks, AI can accurately combine modules and quickly present a runnable project prototype. This not only greatly shortens the project startup time but also allows developers to see the overall architecture of the project faster, providing a clear direction for subsequent development work.

### CORS configuration
Traditional developers seem to be in a maze when dealing with the CORS configuration problem, often spending 2 hours exploring complex network configurations and code adjustments. They need to understand the working principle of CORS, carefully check the settings of each request header and response header, and try various configuration combinations to ensure cross - domain requests go smoothly. In this process, developers not only have to face technical challenges but also have to bear huge psychological pressure, because once improper configuration is implemented, it may cause the entire project interface to be unable to be accessed normally, affecting the project progress.

AI - assisted development provides a one - click solution to this problem. It can automatically identify CORS problems in the project and generate the most appropriate configuration code based on the specific situation of the project. It's like having a master key that can instantly open the door to cross - domain requests. Developers can easily solve CORS problems by simply applying the configuration code generated by AI to the project, simplifying the original tedious work into a simple operation step, greatly improving development efficiency.

### Test case writing
Traditional development methods require developers to manually create 15 test cases. They should comprehensively consider various possible situations, including normal input, abnormal input, boundary conditions, etc., and carefully design the input data and expected output results of each test case. This process requires a lot of time and energy and is prone to omissions, resulting in some potential problems not being discovered in time.

AI has demonstrated strong capabilities in this regard, enabling the generation of test cases covering 98% of the test scenarios in a short time. It can intelligently generate comprehensive and accurate test cases through in - depth analysis of project code, combined with a large amount of historical test data and advanced algorithm models. These test cases can not only cover various conventional scenarios but also keenly capture some border situations and exception scenarios that are easily overlooked, greatly improving the quality and stability of the software.

Through this series of comparisons, we can clearly see the efficient performance of AI in various development links. It is like a powerful force, breaking the constraints of traditional development models and making the development process more efficient and intelligent. These specific data and cases are undoubtedly a powerful proof of the strong strength of AI technology, and also make us deeply realize that AI is leading the field of software development into a new era.

## The dual reality in the wave of technology

### Efficiency revolution
Empowered by AI, the software development process is undergoing an efficiency revolution, and every link is completely renewed by the integration of AI technology, just like giving traditional development models a pair of intelligent wings.

- **Document generation**: AI is amazing in document generation. Take Swagger annotations as an example, it can automatically generate OpenAPI specs and provide files in both YAML and JSON formats. In traditional development, developers need to spend a lot of time manually writing and maintaining interface documents. Not only are they cumbersome and easy to make mistakes, but when the interface changes, the update of documents is often lagging behind. Now, AI can automatically update documents according to changes in code in real - time to ensure consistency between documents and code. This is like having an indefatigable document administrator who always maintains the accuracy and timeliness of documents, greatly improving the efficiency of teamwork and allowing developers to devote more energy to the development of core business.
- **Intelligent debugging**: AI has demonstrated its powerful intelligent analysis capabilities in the intelligent debugging process. In the past, developers often needed to spend a lot of time and energy to analyze the causes of errors and locate the problem when facing error logs. This process is like looking for a needle in a haystack, full of uncertainty and challenges. Now, AI tools can analyze the error log in just 17 seconds, quickly locate the problem location in the code, and provide detailed repair suggestions. It is like an experienced doctor who can quickly and accurately diagnose the "symptoms" in the code and prescribe effective "prescriptions", which greatly shortens debugging time and improves development efficiency.
- **Architectural visualization**: AI also brings a whole new experience in architectural visualization. Developers only need to describe the system architecture in natural language, and PlantUML can automatically generate exquisite architectural diagrams based on these descriptions. In the past, drawing architecture required developers to have professional drawing skills and a deep understanding of the system architecture, and the drawing process was time - consuming and labor - intensive. Now, AI makes the generation of architecture diagrams easy, developers can display the system architecture more intuitively, facilitate communication and understanding among team members, and also help design and evaluation of architecture in the early stage of the project.
- **Knowledge distillation**: Knowledge distillation is another important application of AI technology in software development. It can transform massive amounts of knowledge in technical communities such as Stack Overflow into executable code snippets. In traditional development, developers need to search for solutions in numerous technical documents and forums and then manually convert these solutions into code. Now, AI can automatically complete this process, directly converting knowledge into available code, greatly improving development efficiency. This is like a treasure trove of intelligent knowledge that can quickly provide accurate code solutions according to the needs of developers.

### The undercurrent of eliminating anxiety
While enjoying the efficiency and convenience brought by AI, developers also vaguely feel an undercurrent of elimination anxiety, which is quietly surging in the technology field. This anxiety is not groundless but an inevitable result of the rapid development of AI technology. It profoundly affects developers' technical cognition and career development.

- **Decrease in knowledge memory importance**: With the development of AI, the importance of knowledge memory gradually decreases. In the past, developers needed to spend a lot of time and effort to memorize knowledge about using various APIs, parameter configuration, etc. This knowledge was their "armory" in the development process and was the key to solving problems. However, now the emergence of AI tools has made these memories less important. AI can quickly generate corresponding code based on the developer's natural language description and automatically call the appropriate API. This means that even if developers forget the specific usage of an API, AI can help them solve problems easily. This change makes developers feel that the knowledge they have accumulated over the years seems to be losing value, just like a martial arts master suddenly discovering that his martial arts secrets have become no longer important, and their hearts are inevitably filled with loss and anxiety.
- **Weakening of experience value**: In the field of software development, experience has always been regarded as a valuable asset. Those technical experts with many years of development experience can quickly solve complex technical problems with a deep understanding of various technical issues and rich practical experience. Their experience is like an invisible technical book, guiding young developers. However, the emergence of AI is changing this situation. AI can quickly master various technical skills and solutions by learning a large amount of code and data and can even discover some optimization points that are difficult for human developers to detect. Configuration skills and problem - solving experience that once took ten years or even longer to accumulate, now AI can implement through algorithm optimization in a short period of time. This makes the experience advantages accumulated by developers over the years no longer obvious. They are beginning to worry that their experience will become worthless in front of AI and that their future career development will be seriously affected.
- **Shaking of technological authority status**: The development of AI has also shaken the status of technological authority. In the past, technologists have become the authority of the technology community through their in - depth research and outstanding achievements in specific fields. Their blogs, technical articles, and open - source projects are important resources for developers to learn and reference. However, with the development of AI, the knowledge and experience of these technical experts are gradually being absorbed and integrated by AI and becoming part of AI training data. The once highly respected technology blog has now become a small footnote in the training data in the face of the massive AI knowledge. This change has left technologists feeling challenged in their authority, and the technological influence they have built over the years is gradually fading.

These changes have made developers deeply realize that the technological development in the AI era is changing with each passing day, and traditional technical knowledge and experience are facing the risk of being eliminated. If you do not adjust your learning and development direction in time, you will easily be overwhelmed by the waves of the times.

## Five major trends in the future
![AI Coder](/uploads/1739600347111-3.PNG)
### 1. Tool First: Cognitive Exoskeleton
In today's wave of technological development, AI is reshaping the software development landscape at an astonishing speed, and its outstanding performance in the field of coding is impressive. GPT - 4, as an outstanding representative of AI technology, has shown amazing strength in coding capabilities. It successfully passed Google's L3 coding interview, a score that proves that it has a programming level comparable to that of a senior developer. You should know that Google's L3 encoding interview is extremely difficult and covers multiple aspects of investigation such as complex algorithms, data structures, and actual project experience. Being able to pass this interview means that GPT - 4 has reached a very high level in code writing, problem - solving, and understanding of programming concepts. Obtaining a position as an engineer at Google L3 can earn an annual salary of US$180K, which is not only an economic recognition of its capabilities but also a recognition of AI's status in the field of coding.

In practical application scenarios, Replit's AI pair programming provides us with a vivid case. In the growth process of novice developers, they often face many challenges, such as insufficient understanding of programming concepts and lack of practical project experience, which makes them inefficient and prone to difficulties during the development process. Replit's AI pair programming is like a caring tutor, accompanying beginners in real - time. When a newbie encounters a problem, it can quickly provide code suggestions to help newbies solve syntax errors, logic problems, etc. Through this real - time collaboration and guidance, the work efficiency of novice developers has been greatly improved. According to statistics, the efficiency improvement is as high as 400%. This data intuitively demonstrates the huge potential of AI in improving development efficiency, allowing novice developers to complete more work in a shorter time and accumulate experience quickly.

However, with the deep intervention of AI in the field of coding, a paradox that cannot be ignored has gradually emerged. On the one hand, the widespread application of AI tools has gradually reduced the direct contribution of humans in the process of code writing. Many codes that originally required human developers to write manually are now easily generated by AI, which gradually weakens the role of human developers in code creation. On the other hand, the complexity of the system is growing exponentially. As the functions of software systems become more and more powerful and the requirements become more and more complex, the internal architecture and logic are also becoming more and more complex. Although AI can help us generate code quickly, it does not fully understand the business logic and requirements background of the entire system. This leads to increasing challenges in system design, architecture, and maintenance during the development process. Human developers need to spend more time and effort to understand and manage these complex systems to ensure their stability and reliability. This paradox reminds us that while enjoying the convenience brought by AI, we also need to think about how to better exert human intelligence and creativity and find our new role and positioning in software development in an AI - assisted environment.

### 2. Accelerate knowledge metabolism
In this era of rapid development of technology, the rapid update of technical knowledge is like a never - ending race, which is dazzling. According to relevant research, the half - life of scientific and technological knowledge has been shortened to just 11 months (2023). This means that in just less than a year, half of existing scientific and technological knowledge may be outdated and replaced by new theories, techniques, and methods. In the field of software development, this rapid update of knowledge is particularly evident. New programming languages, frameworks, and tools are emerging like mushrooms after a rain, and old technologies may be eliminated in a short period of time. Some front - end frameworks that were once popular may be replaced by new frameworks in just a few years. Developers have to keep up with the trend and constantly learn new technologies to adapt to the development needs of the industry.

Faced with such a fast update speed of knowledge, a new core skill - prompt engineering is gradually emerging and becoming a necessary ability for developers. Prompt engineering, simply put, is how to effectively interact with AI and, through accurate and clear instructions, let AI understand our needs and generate high - quality code. In the environment of AI - assisted development, developers are no longer just code writers in the traditional sense but also the leader of AI. They need to have good communication skills and logical thinking and be able to turn complex problems into prompts that AI can understand. Just like when using GitHub Copilot, developers need to use concise and clear natural language to describe the functions they want to implement, so that Copilot can generate corresponding code based on these prompts. If the prompt is inaccurate or incomplete, the generated code may not meet the requirements and may even cause errors. Therefore, mastering prompt engineering can enable developers to better utilize AI tools and improve development efficiency and code quality.

This acceleration of knowledge metabolism has also led to a profound change in the way developers learn. In the past, developers often focused on a deep understanding of a certain technology, such as "Proficiency in React", and became experts in the field through a lot of practice and learning. However, in the AI era, this single learning model is no longer applicable. Now, it is more important to master the ability of "AI - assisted React" and learn how to use the power of AI to develop React applications more efficiently. This means that developers should not only understand the basic principles and usage of React but also learn how to use AI tools for code generation, debugging, and optimization. For example, when developing React applications, developers can use AI tools to quickly generate the basic structure of components and then make personalized adjustments based on actual needs. At the same time, AI can also help developers detect potential problems in their code and provide optimization suggestions to improve application performance and stability. This change in learning methods requires developers to have stronger learning ability and adaptability, constantly update their knowledge system, and keep up with the pace of technological development.

### 3. Human - computer symbiosis: from coder to commander
Today, with the rapid development of AI technology, the field of software development is undergoing a profound change, and the role of developers is also quietly changing. Once upon a time, developers mainly played the role of "code typist". Their work focus was to transform software requirements into lines of specific code, carefully crafting every code detail like a craftsman. However, with the widespread use of AI in software development, this traditional role positioning is gradually being subverted. Nowadays, developers are more like conductors of technical symphony orchestras. They need to stand at a higher level, coordinate and adjust the software development process, and reasonably allocate various AI resources to achieve the smooth progress of software projects.
![AI Coder](/uploads/1739600350289-5.PNG)
This evolution of roles puts new requirements on the skills required by developers. In the past, a solid programming foundation and rich code - writing experience were the core competitiveness of developers. Now, in addition to these basic skills, developers also need to have excellent requirements analysis and disassembly capabilities. They need to be able to deeply understand user needs and transform complex business problems into specific technical implementation solutions. At the same time, the ability to integrate and use AI resources has also become crucial. Developers need to understand the characteristics and advantages of various AI tools, be able to select the appropriate AI tools according to the actual needs of the project, and cleverly integrate them into the development process. For example, in the development of an e - commerce project, developers may use AI image recognition technology to realize intelligent classification and search of product images and use natural language processing technology to realize intelligent customer service functions. In addition, quality control capabilities are also indispensable. Although AI can help generate code, the quality and security of the code still require rigorous review and verification by developers to ensure the stability and reliability of the software system.
author: AI Assistant

title: Can AI Rescue Us from Kitchen Measurement Woes?
content:
## The Kitchen's Hidden Foes: Measurement Troubles
The kitchen, a sanctuary of gastronomic delights, is often marred by the vexing specter of measurement conundrums. These issues lurk like stealthy imps, perpetually disrupting our culinary escapades. 
![ai](/uploads/1739601669206-.png)
Take, for instance, my misadventure last week. I embarked on a culinary journey, following an online celebrity's recipe to craft a sumptuous chicken curry. The video, with nonchalant abandon, proclaimed, "Add an appropriate amount of coconut milk." Little did I anticipate that my interpretation of "appropriate" would transform the dish into a sugary abyss, obliterating its original, delicate flavor profile.

And then, there are those international recipes, a veritable labyrinth of unit conversions. The simple instruction of "1 cup of flour" sent me on a dizzying odyssey around the kitchen, clutching a measuring cup, only to be jolted by the realization of the distinction between American and British cup sizes. It felt as though the culinary gods were conspiring to test my mettle. 

Rummaging through the storage cabinet in search of black pepper, I was confronted by a chaotic array of spice bottles, each bearing the inscription "purchased in 2021," their usability hanging in the balance. It was a moment of sheer exasperation.

## AI - The Catalyst for Kitchen Revolution
This weekend, I resolve to enlist the formidable prowess of AI and embark on a revolutionary kitchen transformation. Despite the cobwebs of time that have gathered since my last foray into coding during a college elective, I steeled my nerves and summoned the courage to open the programming assistant. With bated breath, I typed into the input box, "Help me create an intelligent measurement web page capable of seamless unit conversions and meticulous inventory tracking." 

Lo and behold, AI, like a benevolent genie emerging from a digital lamp, instantaneously conjured forth ideas for the unit conversion module. It went a step further, suggesting the addition of an ingredient expiration reminder function, a testament to its prescience. 

Moreover, in a nod to the time - honored traditions of my grandmother, who relies on quaint measurements like "handful" and "pinch," AI proposed the inclusion of a custom measurement dictionary. Such thoughtfulness was truly awe - inspiring.

## Navigating the Development: AI as a Mentor
During the intricate process of debugging, as I grappled with the challenge of enabling seamless data sharing among diverse users, AI assumed the role of a patient and erudite mentor. Instead of proffering a ready - made solution, it gently prodded my thinking, "What if we were to store the measurement data in the cloud, much like the sharing of cherished recipes?" 

In an instant, a spark of enlightenment ignited within me, illuminating the path forward. Through arduous efforts, we have meticulously mapped out two distinct modes: a user - friendly home version and a comprehensive professional chef version. 

Envision a future where my mother can effortlessly synchronize the inventory by merely scanning the spice bottles with her mobile device. No longer shall code be perceived as a cold and impenetrable sequence of symbols; rather, it will serve as a vibrant bridge, connecting the culinary wisdom of generations past and present.

## A Shared Dream: the "Measurement Memory" Vision
Yesterday, a neighbor graced my abode, and our conversation naturally veered towards the tribulations of the kitchen. She regaled me with tales of her own culinary struggles, particularly the arduous task of converting units while preparing a British afternoon tea. Her lamentations were a familiar refrain, echoing the frustrations of countless home cooks. 

I eagerly shared with her my vision for the intelligent measurement web page, highlighting its potential to automate the conversion of British afternoon tea recipes. Her eyes widened with excitement, and she exclaimed, "If you bring this to life, it'll be a game - changer, far superior to any baking scale I've ever used!"

What truly fills me with anticipation is the prospect of integrating a "measurement memory" function into this digital marvel. Picture this: a feature so astute that it discerns and adapts to the unique culinary habits of each user, painstakingly translating those nebulous "appropriate amounts" in recipes into precise, quantifiable measurements. 

In the not - too - distant future, when my daughter finds herself in a far - off land, yearning for the comforting flavors of home, this web page will serve as her trusted companion. It will be a sentinel of taste, guiding her through the intricacies of recreating the dishes of her childhood, ensuring that the warmth of home transcends geographical boundaries. The neighbor, upon hearing this, was enraptured by the vision, expressing her eagerness for such a tool and imploring me to share it with her upon completion.

## Anticipating the Future: AI's Magic in the Kitchen
At present, this remains a tantalizing vision on the horizon, yet I find myself consumed by a palpable sense of excitement, eagerly awaiting the day when this web page materializes. I am convinced that it will herald a new era of convenience and innovation in our kitchen, infusing our culinary endeavors with a touch of magic. Let us join hands in this anticipation, and witness how AI weaves its transformative spell within the intimate confines of our kitchens.
author: AI Assistant
